summary: Iteration 62 - New features tested: DELETE posts, Trending section, Mobile responsiveness. All 9 backend tests PASSED. All frontend features verified working. Delete posts works with 3-dot menu and confirmation. Trending section shows horizontal scroll cards with engagement counts. Mobile responsive design verified with no horizontal overflow.
passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} by author - PASS (returns {status: 'deleted'})
Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} by non-author - PASS (returns 403 Forbidden)
Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{nonexistent_id} - PASS (returns 404 Not Found)
Backend: GET /api/feed/trending - PASS (returns posts sorted by engagement)
Backend: Trending posts include likes_count and comments_count - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts text-only (no image) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/like toggle - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/bookmark toggle - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/comments - PASS
Frontend: Trending section visible with flame icon and 'TRENDING' header - PASS
Frontend: Trending cards show horizontal scroll with user name, caption snippet, like/comment counts - PASS
Frontend: Post author sees 3-dot menu (MoreHorizontal icon) on their posts - PASS
Frontend: Delete option 'Eliminar publicacion' visible in menu dropdown - PASS
Frontend: Delete confirmation with window.confirm() - PASS
Frontend: 'Publicacion eliminada' toast after successful delete - PASS
Frontend: Non-author does NOT see 3-dot menu on others' posts - PASS (verified via code and backend 403 test)
Frontend: Tagged product card shows 'Comprar' link - PASS
Frontend: Mobile (390px) - No horizontal overflow - PASS
Frontend: Mobile - Hero buttons stack vertically - PASS
Frontend: Mobile - Trending section horizontal scroll - PASS
Frontend: Mobile - Discover page filters scrollable horizontally - PASS
Frontend: Mobile - Profile cards 2-column grid - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} properly checks ownership: post['user_id'] != user.user_id returns 403
DELETE endpoint also allows admin/super_admin to delete any post
DELETE cleans up related data: post_likes, post_comments, post_bookmarks
GET /api/feed/trending uses MongoDB aggregation with engagement formula: likes + (comments * 2)
Trending filters posts from last 7 days using created_at >= seven_days_ago
TrendingSection component uses snap-x for horizontal scroll snapping
scrollbar-hide CSS utility properly hides scrollbars
canDelete check (isOwner || isAdmin) correctly gates the 3-dot menu visibility
Mobile responsive CSS uses sm: breakpoints for padding/font sizes
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and deleted during testing: TEST_delete_me_*, TEST_not_yours_*, TEST_text_only_post_*, TEST_like_test_*, TEST_bookmark_test_*, TEST_comment_test_*, TEST_iteration62_delete_test_post
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 tested new features: 1) DELETE posts - DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} returns 403 for non-owner, cleans up likes/comments/bookmarks. Frontend shows 3-dot MoreHorizontal menu only to post owner, with 'Eliminar publicacion' option and window.confirm() dialog. 2) Trending section - GET /api/feed/trending returns posts sorted by engagement (likes + comments*2) from last 7 days. TrendingSection component shows horizontal scroll cards with flame icon. 3) Mobile responsive - scrollbar-hide utility, sm: breakpoints, snap-x for scroll snapping. No horizontal overflow at 390px viewport.

delete_posts.frontend_menu_visibility: 3-dot menu only on own posts - Working

trending_section.backend_7_day_filter: Only posts from last 7 days - Working
trending_section.frontend_visibility: Trending section with flame icon - Working
trending_section.frontend_cards: Horizontal scroll cards with user/counts - Working

mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all features use real backend implementation
